coverage_scope: countrywide season schedule and reviewed venue network
decision: The reviewed ERA season schedule supports manual C-level meeting-date and venue confirmation. It does not establish reusable first-race, last-race, or per-race post times.
limitations: No numbered UAE source-test directory existed in the earlier batch.
This record reuses reviewed country-profile and official season-schedule evidence only.
Detailed programme and racecard content remains on official sources.
